title: ferula newberryi
intro: Ferula newberryi, also known as Newberry's giant fennel or desert ferula, is a perennial plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Ferula newberryi contains compounds with medicinal properties, including volatile oils and sesquiterpenes, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions. Ferula newberryi can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
